name: GOLFTEC San Antonio
address: 18410 US-281 N, Suite 105-B1, San Antonio, TX 78259
about: GOLFTEC San Antonio is a golf training and club fitting center focused on data-driven improvement using advanced technology. The facility offers personalized golf lessons, club fittings, and practice sessions utilizing proprietary systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors. Coaching programs are structured to provide long-term progress with personal game plans, and the center emphasizes a professional, educational environment for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized game plans and coaching strategies tailored to individual goals
Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Access to training bays with launch monitors and video feedback

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned as a product sold and integrated with GOLFTEC's services.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs. Club rentals are also available, and the center provides all necessary equipment for fittings and lessons.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink services. It is recommended to contact the location directly for specific policies on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play a full 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons, fittings, and practice, not on playing full rounds of golf. The time for a typical lesson or fitting session varies.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes juniors and youth. They have programs designed for younger golfers and mention a family-friendly environment.
